welcome: Hi, I'm Melhiq (መልህቅ) — I help with complaints, MoPD services, and related public information. Pick a topic below or type your question.
stubReply: Thanks for your question. Full AI answers are coming soon. For now, try the quick links below, visit our FAQ, or contact MoPD directly.

disclaimer: Melhiq gives general guidance only — not legal advice. Confirm important details with an official source. Do not share passwords or sensitive personal data.
